# UC-14.10.9 · Aranet Overnight CO2 Baseline Drift for Ventilation Degradation

## Description

Rising overnight CO2 baselines when buildings are empty indicates stuck dampers, fan belts, or schedule bugs.

## Value

Catches HVAC degradation without occupant complaints.

## Implementation

(1) Exclude holidays. (2) Compare to outdoor CO2 if available. (3) Handoff to TAB contractor.

## SPL

```spl
index=environment sourcetype="aranet:sensor" earliest=-14d
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| eval co2=tonumber(coalesce(co2_ppm, ""))
| where (hour>="22" OR hour<="05")
| timechart span=1d median(co2) as overnight_median_co2 by location
```

## Visualization

Line overnight median; anomaly alert.

## References

- [Aranet — environmental monitoring](https://aranet.com/)
- [ASHRAE — IAQ](https://www.ashrae.org/)
- [OSHA indoor air](https://www.osha.gov/indoor-air-quality)
